body:
### Why this matters

AWS Lambda `provided.al2` custom runtimes are based on Amazon Linux 2 and have a Lambda deprecation date of July 31, 2026. After deprecation, create and update restrictions follow, and teams can be forced into urgent custom runtime rebuilds.

### What this control checks

This control finds AWS Lambda functions using the `provided.al2` runtime. Migrate custom runtimes to `provided.al2023` and rebuild native dependencies against Amazon Linux 2023 before the lifecycle date.

### Operational note

Custom runtime migrations require testing bootstrap behavior, native libraries, OpenSSL/glibc compatibility, Lambda extensions, and deployment packages or container build images.
name: Ensure AWS Lambda custom runtimes are not using provided.al2
description: AWS Lambda functions using the provided.al2 runtime before deprecation
timedControlSummary: AWS Lambda functions on provided.al2 should be migrated before the July 31, 2026 deprecation date.
timedControlDisruptionRisk: Late custom runtime migrations can block function updates and require urgent rebuilds of native dependencies.
remediationDescription:
## AWS remediation

> **Service-wide custom-runtime migration (recommended):** migrate all Lambda custom runtimes on Amazon Linux 2 together where possible. This lets platform teams rebuild shared layers, native dependencies, extensions, and CI/CD packaging once.

### AWS Console

1. Open the Lambda function.
2. Review the runtime, layers, extensions, and deployment package build process.
3. Rebuild the custom runtime and dependencies for Amazon Linux 2023.
4. Change the runtime to `provided.al2023` and deploy through a staging alias or canary release.
5. Validate logs, cold starts, native dependencies, and integrations before full traffic shift.

### AWS CLI

Inspect the current runtime:

```bash
aws lambda get-function-configuration \
  --function-name <function-name> \
  --query '{Runtime:Runtime,State:State,LastModified:LastModified}'
```

Update the runtime after rebuilding the deployment package:

```bash
aws lambda update-function-configuration \
  --function-name <function-name> \
  --runtime provided.al2023
```

### References

- https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lambda/latest/dg/lambda-runtimes.html
- https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lambda/latest/dg/runtimes-custom.html

timedControlRules.summary: AWS Lambda functions on provided.al2 should be migrated before the July 31, 2026 deprecation date.
timedControlRules.disruptionRisk: Late custom runtime migrations can block function updates and require urgent rebuilds of native dependencies.
timedControlRules.recommendedTarget: Migrate to provided.al2023 and rebuild custom runtime artifacts for Amazon Linux 2023.
